subcodes.first_line: Verily, We have willed to make mention of one among the servants and to herald unto him that which hath been ordained for him by God, the Lord of all worlds. We have turned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا اردنا ان نذکر احدا من العباد و نبشره بما قدر له من لدی الله رب العالمین انا اقبلنا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
